item.title: Mirror selfie of Dana, her blonde hair up and rain-soaked, wearing a long-sleeve grey top, belted blue jeans, a leather jacket, and dark glasses

item.title: Debbie Harry on stage in a pink shirt and black cardigan, her blonde bangs hanging in her eyes

item.title: A photo of Dana's pink journal, with a pen on top, sitting on the electric piano in her office

item.title: Mirror selfie of Dana in a grey top, belted black jeans, and a large black cardigan, with large dark framed glasses, sitting on her bed

item.title: Dana's feet on gravel pavement; she's wearing black Mary Janes, black Vans ankle socks, and black jeans with the cuffs rolled up

item.title: Jeopardy question on Dana's TV: As a child, Christopher Robin Milne loved feeding a London Zoo animal whose former owner hailed from this city

item.title: A cut open fig on a plate with a spoon on top of Dana's laptop
